subcodes.first_line: A remembrance unto him who hath rent asunder the veils and turned unto God, his Lord, the All-Glorious, the All-Bountiful, that he may inhale the fragrances of the All-Merciful from this [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکری لمن خرق الاحجاب و اقبل الی الله ربه العزیز الوهاب لیجد نفحه الرحمن من هذا
subcodes.subjects: @the power of words; of speech, @spiritual transformation, @contention and conflict, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
